title: lotus oroboides var. ramulosus
intro: Lotus oroboides var. ramulosus, also known as the Himalayan lotus, is a variant of the lotus oroboides plant, a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of lotus oroboides var. ramulosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried root or leaf extract, and can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
